---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
```



```{r}
# split based on dem/prf
#folder_dem <- folder_name %>% str_subset("_dem$")

#folder_dem
```

```{r}
# create rds folder
dir.create("../rds/",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../rds/test",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../rds/inj",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../rds/surg",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
```

```{r}
# all oral folders

folder_test<- list.files("../xlsx/test")


folder_test
```

```{r}
dir.create("../rds/test/year",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../rds/inj/year",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../rds/surg/year",
             showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
```


```{r}
# function for converting year, will be used inside the next function
convert_year <- function(x){
  if (str_detect(x, "^H")){
    y <- x %>% str_remove("^H") %>% as.numeric()
    y <- y + 1988
    return(as.character(y))
  }
  else if (str_detect(x, "^R")){
    y <- x %>% str_remove("^R") %>% as.numeric()
    y <- y + 2018
    return(as.character(y))
  }
  else{
    return(x)
  }
}
```


```{r}
# function for reading the first line and getting the year information

get_year <- function(x){
  read.xlsx(x, sheet = 1, startRow =1 , colNames = FALSE, rows = 1) %>% 
    rename(DES_jp = "X1") %>%
    mutate(FILE = x) %>%
    mutate(FILE = str_extract(FILE, "(?<=\\/)00[:digit:]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "　※.+") )  %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "診療年月："))　%>%
 #   separate_wider_delim(CHR, delim = "　",
 #                        names = c("YEAR", "EXP"),
#                         too_few = "align_start") %>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = str_extract(DES_jp, "[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = str_extract(DES_jp, "(?<=～)[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = convert_year(YEAR_str)) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = convert_year(YEAR_end)) 
}
```


```{r}
# x is the folder path
# y is subcategory

save_df_year <- function(x, y){
  xlsx <- list.files(paste0("../xlsx/", x, "/", y))
  from <- paste0("../xlsx/", x , "/", y, "/", xlsx)
  
  df <- map(from, get_year) %>% list_rbind()
  
  saveRDS(df, paste0("../rds/", x,  "/year/","df_year_", x, "_", y))
}
```

```{r}
list.files("../xlsx")
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(folder_test)){
  save_df_year("test", folder_test[i])
  print(paste(folder_test[i], "completed"))
}
```
```{r}
df_ex <- readRDS("../rds/test/year/df_year_test_dem")
```

# ext

```{r}
# all inj folders

folder_inj <- list.files("../xlsx/inj")

folder_inj
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(folder_inj)){
  save_df_year("inj", folder_inj[i])
  print(paste(folder_inj[i], "completed"))
}
```


# prf

```{r}
# all surg folders

folder_surg <- list.files("../xlsx/surg")


folder_surg
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(folder_surg)){
  save_df_year("surg", folder_surg[i])
  print(paste(folder_surg[i], "completed"))
}
```

# end of run


```{r}
df_ex <- readRDS("../rds/inj/year/df_year_inj_dem")
```
